author: dashboard-bootstrap
content: Three surfaces edited: (1) docs_src/guides/kickoff.qmd — new '### Configuring agent permissions' subsection at end of '## Controlled agent execution', contrasting persistent .claude/settings.json (allowedTools + permissions blocks) with the per-invocation --skip-permissions flag; (2) docs_src/guides/container-agents.qmd — extended the existing --dangerously-skip-permissions paragraph with a follow-up pointing at the persistent mechanism, cross-linked to the kickoff guide section; (3) src/main.rs — tightened both --skip-permissions doc-comments (kickoff run + kickoff plan variants) so --help itself surfaces the contrast. Verified rendered --help output. cargo fmt --check clean, cargo check clean. No new tests — pure docs/help-text change with no behavioral surface.
